game_info.title: MineQuest - 2D Sandbox Adventure
game_info.concept: This 2D sandbox adventure game allows players to explore vast, procedurally generated worlds, mine resources, craft items, build structures, and engage in combat against various enemies and bosses. The game features a dynamic day/night cycle influencing enemy spawns, and progression is driven by acquiring better tools, armor, and weapons through crafting and defeating bosses, which in turn unlock new materials, NPCs, and world events.
game_info.description: Welcome to MineQuest, a 2D sandbox adventure! Explore a procedurally generated world filled with resources, enemies, and challenges. Mine blocks to gather materials, craft better tools and weapons, build structures for protection, and battle increasingly difficult enemies. Progress through the game by defeating bosses to unlock new biomes and crafting recipes. Survive the dangerous nights when more enemies spawn, and use the safer daytime to gather resources and prepare. Your goal is to defeat the final boss and master the world!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move player left/right, climb ladders up/down
Space: Jump (when on ground)
Z: Primary action - Mine blocks, attack enemies, place blocks (hold to mine/attack)
Shift: Toggle crafting menu (when open, use arrow keys to navigate, Z to craft)
Enter: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests the core game loop: mining resources, crafting tools, and defeating the first boss. This validates that the progression system works correctly and the player can advance through the game tiers.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The AI mines initial wood and stone blocks, crafts a wooden pickaxe, then stone pickaxe, followed by mining iron ore. It crafts iron tools and armor, then seeks out and defeats the first boss using strategic combat. After victory, it validates that new crafting recipes are unlocked.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test is successful when the AI defeats the first boss (Stone Golem) and achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state. The test validates mining mechanics, crafting system, combat mechanics, boss AI behavior, and progression unlocking work correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests resource gathering and inventory management. Validates that the player can collect different types of resources and that inventory limits work correctly.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The AI systematically mines different block types (dirt, stone, wood, iron) to fill inventory slots. It validates that blocks break at appropriate speeds based on tool type and that resources are properly added to inventory.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test succeeds when the AI has collected at least one of each basic resource type and the inventory correctly tracks all gathered materials without errors or overflow.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests combat mechanics and enemy interactions. Validates that the player can damage enemies, take damage, and that health/death systems work properly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The AI engages with basic enemies (slimes and zombies) using crafted weapons. It tests different weapon types and validates damage calculation, knockback effects, and enemy AI pathfinding toward the player.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The test is successful when the AI defeats multiple enemies, takes damage without dying, and validates that combat feedback (damage numbers, health bars) displays correctly.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests building mechanics and block placement. Validates that players can place blocks to create structures and platforms.
TEST_4.strategy_description: The AI collects building materials and places blocks in various patterns to create simple structures like walls, platforms, and protective barriers. It tests placement rules and collision detection with placed blocks.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The test succeeds when the AI successfully places multiple blocks that persist in the world and can be walked on, validating that building mechanics work correctly.
